name: Apricot Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter with sugar in a large bowl until smooth.
3. Add egg yolk and mix well.
4. Stir in flour until combined.
5. Add walnuts and blend thoroughly; the dough will be soft.
6. Divide the dough into two halves.
7. Spread one half evenly into the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
8. Cover with Apricot jam, spreading carefully to the edges using a knife.
9. Drop remaining dough over the jam in spoonfuls and spread carefully to the edges.
10. Bake until the top is golden brown, about 45-60 minutes.
11. Let cool slightly before cutting into squares.
